headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Cerebras Systems, Cleveland-Cliffs, Equity Residential, FuelCell Energy, Lennar, Luckin Coffee, Toll Brothers, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after the bulls tried to rally stocks on Monday, after the drubbing they took on Friday, and it looks the same way today. While it was a partial victory on Monday, by the close, the huge gains from the morning were cut in half, and the Dow Jones ... headline: RBC Capital Downgrades Equity Residential to Sector Perform, Raises Price Target to $70
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brad Heffern   downgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Outperform to Sector Perform and raises the price target from $69 to $70.
